summary: 4-phase plan to fix skolem_abundance over-constraint: conditional dispatch to grounded constraints at M>=3, restore M=max(depth+2,3), update boundary tests

artifacts.summary: Root cause analysis of MBQI blowup from triply-nested quantifier in capped_skolem_abundance_constraint at M>=3, with constraint complexity breakdown, three fix options, and recommendation to dispatch to existing build_grounded_abundance_constraints
Implementation plan with 4 sequential phases: TDD red tests, semantic.py dispatch fix, provider.py M formula + test updates, full regression gate
